reasoning: The prospect of Senator Mark Kelly being recalled to active duty emerged in late 2025 following a video where he urged military members not to obey illegal orders. However, news reports from 2026 confirm that the Defense Department backed down from attempting a court-martial (which would require recalling him to active duty) in early January. Furthermore, their backup plan of administratively downgrading his retirement rank and pay was blocked by a federal judge on February 13, 2026, and federal prosecutors failed to secure an indictment against him around the same time. The community prediction on March 6 was 1%. With all momentum stalled and legal pathways actively blocked by the courts, the chances of Kelly being recalled to active duty between now (March 15, 2026) and April 1, 2026, are virtually zero.
